section.div: Smart Cooking Pantry, Recipe Intelligence & Nutrition Tracking App

Phi-Gen is an AI-powered Flask web application that fine-tunes / trains a base model to generate newly original, high-quality contest math problems (e.g., AIME, Euclid, CS/IMC) with solutions, based on a dataset of contest styles. Built by the team behind Project Phi.

What if ChatGPT had its own voice? What if you could speak to it with your voice? What if this is Alexa brought to a higher intelligence of several folds? Explore this repo to experience this innovative exhibition of AI language models.
